description: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and making choices that don't read as templated defaults.
representativeQueries: Help me create a distinctive visual identity for my new product
I need guidance on typography choices for my website redesign
How can I make my UI design feel less templated and more unique?
Design an aesthetic direction for my new web application
Guide me through creating a memorable visual design system
